user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new tax deduction category, so that employees can classify their investment declarations correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Categories screen; When I click Add/Edit Category and provide a category name and max limit; Then the new category is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing category, so that I can keep its name and maximum limit up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a category is listed; When I click Edit and change its name or max limit; Then the updated values are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view categories with their name and maximum allowable limit, so that I can review the deduction ceilings at a glance
acceptance_criteria: Given categories exist; When I open the Categories screen; Then each category is displayed with its Category name and Max limit

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter categories by financial year, so that I see the deduction limits applicable to the selected year
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Categories screen; When I select a financial year; Then only the categories configured for that year are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the categories list, so that I always see the latest saved data
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes to categories; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with the current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the categories list, so that I can navigate large sets of categories
acceptance_criteria: Given there are multiple categories; When I use the pagination controls; Then the corresponding page of categories is displayed
